entities.name: 对话数据
entities.description: The core data object being annotated, consisting of prompts and model outputs.

entities.name: 标注流程
entities.description: The complete workflow for annotating data, including scoring and labeling.

entities.name: 打分
entities.description: The process of assigning a score (0-4) to the model output based on specific criteria.

entities.name: 问题标签
entities.description: Tags assigned to identify specific issues in the thinking process and product.

entities.name: 产物
entities.description: The output generated by the AI model in response to a prompt.

entities.name: prompt/指令
entities.description: The input instruction or request given to the AI model.

entities.name: thinking 过程
entities.description: The reasoning or internal process log generated by the AI model before the final output.

entities.name: AI 模型
entities.description: The artificial intelligence system generating the responses and thinking processes.

entities.name: 通用问题标签【v2.0】
entities.description: The specific rule document version used for referencing problem tags during annotation.

entities.name: 同学
entities.description: The annotators or students performing the data labeling tasks.

entities.name: 数据整合
entities.description: A task type involving data collection, integration, and conclusion drawing.

entities.name: 富媒体生成
entities.description: A task type involving the generation of videos or images.

entities.name: 自动化流程
entities.description: A task type requiring the AI to perform web operations or automated tasks.

entities.name: GUI 生成
entities.description: A task type requiring the AI to generate visual graphical web interfaces.

entities.name: DCG 评分
entities.description: The specific scoring method (0-4 scale) used for evaluating the trial annotation tasks.

hyperedges.relation: Scoring evaluation is based on how well the product meets the prompt requirements.
hyperedges.label: Scoring Evaluation Triad

hyperedges.relation: Problem labeling requires evaluating both the thinking process and the final product together.
hyperedges.label: Labeling Evaluation Context

hyperedges.relation: These are the four main task dimensions used to categorize data for specific annotation checks.
